description: Security boundaries, payload validation, redaction, tests, browser validation, documentation, and deployment rollout gates for Web Annotations.

userStories.title: Add payload validation limits and redaction utilities
userStories.description: As a security reviewer, I want bounded validated annotation payloads so that page-derived content cannot flood storage or prompts.
acceptanceCriteria: Add shared validation schemas for binding creation, overlay submissions, status updates, thread messages, and message attachments
Enforce maximum lengths/counts for note, selector, DOM paths, text snippets, HTML hints, class summaries, accessibility hints, source raw metadata, thread messages, and attachment count
Add shared redaction/truncation utility for prompt rendering and UI/tool serializers where appropriate
Tests cover oversized fields, secret-like text, long HTML, and screenshot references
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in this run: added shared Web Annotation validation/redaction utilities and wired them into store/API/CDP/tool/attachment paths; added focused tests for oversized fields, secret-like redaction, long HTML/source raw metadata, thread limits, and screenshot reference omission from prompt context. Docker worker typecheck and focused build/tests passed.

userStories.title: Harden API and tool authorization tests
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want authorization tests across API and tool paths so that annotations cannot cross owner or session boundaries.
acceptanceCriteria: Add tests for unauthorized owner/session access in annotation list/get/update APIs
Add tests for unauthorized owner/session access in native tools
Add tests for invalid or malformed binding tokens and overlay attempts to spoof owner/session/room fields
Add tests for stale composer attachment ids and invalid status transitions
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add browser validation fixtures and checks
userStories.description: As a QA engineer, I want deterministic browser fixtures so that overlay and Chat Web behavior can be validated before gateway deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: Add or document a simple static HTML fixture for element, pin/region, large text, and missing source hints
Add or document a React dev fixture for stable attributes and source-hint capture where practical
Run browser checks for target open/attach, overlay inject, create annotation, reload/re-inject, attach to message, and resolve through tool/API path
Browser verification passes in a Docker compute worker
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update Web Annotations documentation and troubleshooting
userStories.description: As an operator, I want docs for scope, privacy, and recovery so that I can use Web Annotations safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Update docs with V1 user flow, tool list, status lifecycle, source-hint confidence, target close/reload recovery, and privacy behavior
Document that Chrome Extension support, public sharing, and automatic source edits are out of scope for V1
Document common errors: CDP unavailable, no targets, injection failed, cross-origin iframe unavailable, unauthorized annotation, and oversized payload
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add rollout checklist and deployment gates
userStories.description: As an operator, I want explicit validation gates so that production deployment only happens after worker and dev checks succeed.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a rollout checklist under docs/project or the PRD README covering Docker worker validation, typecheck, unit tests, Chat Web build/typecheck, browser checks, dev deployment, and production approval
Checklist instructs using pibo compute worker workflow before code changes and ./scripts/deploy-web-dev.sh before production deployment
Checklist states production deploy requires explicit user approval
Do not deploy production in this story
Typecheck passes
